title: Mox' Masonry
description: Adds some building blocks to the game all made from stone.
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bdd00d7c5b555be7ff1352a96b54f884112fa4c5.png)

Support me here!: ko-fi.com/moxiemc

This mod adds some blocks themed around masonry.
I added some blocks that I thought Mojang had sort of forgotten, but there's some other ones too.

There's some variations on the vanilla stone tools. Most of them are basically the same as stone tools, but the deepslate ones have slightly more durability, and the gilded blackstone tools are a mix of gold tool stats, with stone tool durability.

<details>
<summary>Currently adds:</summary>
  
- Polished Andesite/Diorite/Granite Bricks + Mossy variants:
